start: ^BUKSU PRESS Personel: This is the University Press.
continue_1: ^BUKSU PRESS Personel: It’s located beside the College of Law building.
continue_2: ^BUKSU PRESS Personel: The University Press is an Income Generating Unit and a state-of-the-art printing facility.
continue_3: ^BUKSU PRESS Personel: It leads in the development of printing innovation across the university.
continue_4: ^BUKSU PRESS Personel: They offer printing services for digital documents like instructional materials, event programs, calendars, and planners.
continue_5: ^BUKSU PRESS Personel: They also print posters, newsletters, and other advertising materials.
continue_6: ^BUKSU PRESS Personel: Additional services include binding, cutting, and large-format printing.
continue_7: ^BUKSU PRESS Personel: They also create customized cases and produce identification cards for students and staff.
